title: Integrated Shield Plan (IP)
text:
Integrated Shield Plan (IP) - SupportGoWhere
Integrated Shield Plan (IP)
Share link
A private medical insurance plan, offered by private insurers, that provides optional additional coverage on top of what you are already covered for under MediShield Life.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
IPs offers optional additional coverage on top of MediShield Life, targeted at covering unsubsidised care in public hospitals or private hospital bills
The additional private insurance component of your Integrated Shield Plan premium is payable by MediSave, up to the Additional Withdrawal Limits
Collapse all sections
About this support

MediShield Life component:

Fully payable by MediSave

Sized for subsidised care (e.g B2 / C wards) in public hospital

Additional private insurance component:

Payable by MediSave, but only up to the Additional Withdrawal Limits

Covers unsubsidised care (e.g. A, B1 wards) in public hospitals or private hospital bills

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents

How to apply?

There are a variety of IPs with different levels of coverage

When deciding whether to buy an IP, you should consider what you would like to be covered for and whether you can afford the plan, especially in the long term

You may refer to MOH, Comparison of Integrated Shield Plans or Health Insurance Planner for a comparison of IP benefits and long-term IP premiums across different plans

Where can I find help?

View more details

Healthcare Hotline: 1800-222-3399

To avoid waiting on the line, you may book an appointment here.

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest branch

Note: By appointment only

Scheme last updated 08 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
